productionCheckSteps: Use explicitly authorized production readonly access only.
Confirm the environment label is production before running any query.
Run only the 12 SELECT statements from the query pack.
Record present/missing result for each expected object.
Do not print connection string, account, password, host, token, or DATABASE_URL.
stagingCheckSteps: Use explicitly authorized staging readonly access only.
Confirm the environment label is staging before running any query.
Record present/missing result for each expected object.
Compare staging with production, but do not treat staging as production proof.
alreadyAppliedRule: All 12 expected objects are present in the checked environment.
partiallyAppliedRule: Some expected objects are present and some are missing, or production/staging disagree.
missingRule: All expected objects for a migration are missing, or a required base table/enum is missing.
whenToEnterMigrationReleaseMode: A target environment is missing required objects.
Migration release runbook names exact migration files.
whenToEnterDuplicateCleanup: Production and staging both already contain all expected objects.
Files are proven duplicate or accidental artifacts.
Hashes and current status are recorded first.
whyCannotRunMigrationNow: productionDbCheck is not performed in this step.
stagingDbCheck is not performed in this step.
No production/staging secret was requested or used.
No backup evidence or rollback plan was supplied for execution.
The current task is manual kit finalization only.
warnings: This kit does not prove production or staging state until a human runs it with authorized readonly access.
